about.title: About BPYP
paragraphs: The BITS Pilani Youth Parliament is a premier simulation designed to foster diplomatic leadership, rigorous policy debate, and an understanding of parliamentary procedures.
Join us to step into the shoes of global leaders and draft actionable resolutions.

highlights.title: Leadership
highlights.desc: Step into the shoes of global leaders.

highlights.title: Networking
highlights.desc: Connect with peers across the nation.
